shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' | head -200 && printf '\\n--- package ---\\n' && (sed -n '1,220p' package.json 2>/dev/null || true)"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' app/layout.tsx && printf '\\n--- config ---\\n' && sed -n '1,200p' next.config.ts && printf '\\n--- tsconfig ---\\n' && sed -n '1,200p' tsconfig.json"

/bin/bash -lc "test -d node_modules && printf 'node_modules present\\n' || printf 'node_modules absent\\n'; rg -n \"function forbidden|declare.*forbidden|authInterrupts|forbidden\\(\" node_modules/next node_modules/@types 2>/dev/null | head -100"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,230p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/03-api-reference/04-functions/forbidden.mdx; printf '\\n--- types ---\\n'; rg -n \"forbidden\" node_modules/next/navigation-types/compat/navigation.d.ts node_modules/next/dist/client/components/navigation.d.ts node_modules/next/dist/build/index.d.ts 2>/dev/null | head -30; printf '\\n--- config types ---\\n'; rg -n \"authInterrupts\" node_modules/next/dist/server/config-shared.d.ts node_modules/next/dist/server/config-schema.d.ts node_modules/next/dist/server/config.d.ts 2>/dev/null | head -20"

/bin/bash -lc "curl -sS -D - -o /tmp/admin-response.html http://localhost:3000/admin | sed -n '1,20p'; printf '\\n--- body markers ---\\n'; rg -o \"ERROR 403|Access denied|Admin Dashboard|Return home\" /tmp/admin-response.html | sort | uniq -c"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
